\tzpentry{ID5524}{Phase Angle Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5524 introduces Phase Angle Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} G(r,\theta,\phi) = g(\theta,\phi) \left(\frac{r}{R}\right)^{\beta} \cos\!\left( \kappa\ln\frac{r}{R} + \varphi_0 \right). \end{equation}
